headline: AI Did What Trump's Tariffs Didn't: Revive US Manufacturing
summary: U.S. manufacturing PMI hit 54 in April, a 47-month high. AI capex, not Trump tariffs, is doing the heavy lifting — and Wall Street is betting on more.
